CustomField.description: Caller-supplied logical idempotency key for this signal. When set, at-most-once signal delivery is enforced per (instance, key) pair via a unique constraint on Workflow_Signal__c.Signal_Key__c. Omit for at-least-once behavior (existing default). Limitations: applies to forward/data signals only — Cancel/CancelWorkflow control signals are not deduped by this key; and it has no effect on pre-arrival (unrouted) signals captured before any matching instance is active.
CustomField.label: Idempotency Key
